raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "Governor Gavin Newsom’s proposed budget invests $22.5 billion in Climate Action.",
    "The budget includes $6.1 billion proposed over a 5-year period to catalyze the transition to Zero-Emissions Vehicles.",
    "$2 billion is allocated for Clean Energy investments to advance building and industry decarbonization, wind energy, and long-duration energy storage.",
    "The proposed budget includes $500 million for climate-workforce development.",
